hypothesis: Add price change flag feature: binary indicator of whether sell_price dropped vs last week. This is a simple, fast-to-compute feature that captures promotional pricing signals. price_drop_flag_7 = 1 if current price < price 7 days ago, else 0. Also add price_drop_flag_28 for monthly price drops. All other settings match best run (exp_0044, WRMSSE=0.94391) with long lags.
